title: Earthy Juicy Italian Portobello Mushrooms Skewers
description: A Jain-friendly Italian dish featuring cumin and tandoor flavors, perfect for a dinner party. These skewers are earthy, juicy, and full of flavor.

ingredients.name: Portobello mushrooms
ingredients.notes: stems removed and caps sliced 1/2 inch thick

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, cumin seeds, tandoor masala, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the mushroom slices.
Thread 2-3 mushroom slices onto each bamboo skewer.
Grill the skewers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they are tender and slightly charred.
Brush with lemon juice during the last minute of grilling.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Serve with a side of roasted vegetables or a salad for a complete meal.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
